metrics.metric_definition: Current market price of GME common stock, represented by the most recent closing price or intraday last-trade price.

source_bindings.freshness_cadence: end-of-day; intraday available during market hours
source_bindings.notes: Verified 2026-05-27: returned GME (GameStop Corp.) close=22.15 USD on NYSE. Free tier, no API key required for delayed data.

metrics.metric_definition: Open interest for each listed GME option contract, broken down by strike price and expiration date, separated into calls and puts.

source_bindings.notes: Verified 2026-05-27: yfinance returned 38 call strikes and 36 put strikes for nearest expiration (2026-05-29). 17 expirations available. OI confirmed non-zero across multiple strikes.

metrics.metric_definition: Implied volatility for each listed GME option contract as quoted by the exchange, representing the market's expectation of future volatility embedded in option prices.

source_bindings.notes: Verified 2026-05-27: impliedVolatility field present and populated on every option row (e.g., ATM call IV ~2.55 for 2026-05-29 expiry). Values are annualized decimals.

metrics.metric_definition: 30-day implied volatility for GME, calculated as the interpolated at-the-money IV from the two nearest expiration dates that bracket 30 calendar days to expiry.

source_bindings.notes: Derived: select ATM options (strike nearest to spot) from the two expirations bracketing 30 DTE, then linearly interpolate their IV. Source fields (impliedVolatility, strike) verified available.

exhaustion_log: CBOE does not provide a free GME-specific IV30 index; IVX data requires paid subscription.
No free third-party API found providing pre-computed IV30 for individual equities.

metrics.metric_definition: 20-day historical (realized) volatility of GME, computed as the annualized standard deviation of the natural log of daily close-to-close returns over the trailing 20 trading days.

source_bindings.notes: Derived: HV20 = STDDEV(LN(close[t]/close[t-1])) over 20 trading days, annualized by * SQRT(252). Verified 62+ trading days of close prices available.

metrics.metric_definition: The strike price at which the total dollar value of outstanding GME options (calls + puts) would expire with the least value, representing the theoretical price that causes maximum loss for option holders.

source_bindings.notes: Derived: for each candidate strike K, sum intrinsic-value losses across all call OI (max(0, K-strike)*OI) and put OI (max(0, strike-K)*OI). The K that minimizes total losses is max pain. OI data verified available per strike.

exhaustion_log: No free API provides pre-computed max pain for GME.

metrics.metric_definition: Put-to-call open interest ratio for GME options, computed as the total put open interest divided by total call open interest across all strikes for a given expiration (or aggregated across all expirations).

source_bindings.notes: Derived: SUM(put.openInterest) / SUM(call.openInterest). Both call and put OI fields verified present and populated across all strikes.

metrics.metric_definition: Net Gamma Exposure for GME, representing the aggregate gamma-weighted open interest across all strikes, indicating how much delta-hedging market makers must perform for a $1 move in the underlying.
metrics.expected_grain: daily per-symbol (and per-strike for GEX profile)

source_bindings.notes: Derived: gamma is computed via Black-Scholes (N'(d1) / (S * sigma * sqrt(T))) using per-strike IV, spot price, and DTE. GEX per strike = gamma * OI * 100 * spot. Net GEX = SUM(call_GEX) - SUM(put_GEX). All input fields verified available. Risk-free rate assumed from US Treasury yield.

exhaustion_log: Yahoo Finance does not provide Greeks directly; must derive gamma from Black-Scholes.
CBOE provides Greeks on its website but not via a free structured API for GME specifically.

metrics.metric_definition: Percentile rank of the current IV30 relative to the trailing 252-trading-day (1-year) range of IV30, indicating whether current implied volatility is historically high or low for GME.

source_bindings.notes: Derived: IV Rank = (current_IV30 - min_IV30_252d) / (max_IV30_252d - min_IV30_252d). Requires the pipeline to accumulate daily IV30 snapshots over 252 trading days before this metric becomes fully accurate. Link status is 'proxy' because the initial period will use a shorter lookback window. After 252 days of accumulation, link status upgrades to 'exact'.

exhaustion_log: No free provider offers pre-computed historical IV30 time series for individual equities.
CBOE IVX requires paid data subscription.
Self-accumulation from daily IV30 snapshots is the only viable free approach.
